meta.tagline: Cinema as a soft, steady defense against noise, speed, and forgetting.
meta.description: Tawanen ASBL — a network at the intersection of audiovisual arts, cinema, culture, and politics in Brussels.
hero.lead: Tawanen slows time in a world rushing forward — revealing quiet identities, hidden stories, and images that resist erasure.
mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: We are a network at the intersection of audiovisual arts, cinema, culture, and politics. We create a space that produces and presents images as tools of understanding and resistance. We develop workshops and projects exploring identities and cultures, making content that challenges one-sided narratives and reveals hidden layers. The image, shaped with honesty and a slow rhythm in a fast world, becomes a quiet defense against propaganda.
vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: An image that precedes ready-made narratives, restores balance to time, and returns depth and meaning to the human experience.
pillars.title: Our Pillars
pillars.intro: Three interconnected practices rooted in craft, attention, and collective presence.
pillars.tawānigraph.title: Tawānigraph
pillars.tawānigraph.subtitle: Production & Post-Production
pillars.tawānigraph.text: Where body, movement, and material distill into image through careful production and post-production craft.
pillars.tawanoscope.title: Tawanoscope
pillars.tawanoscope.subtitle: Labs & Workshops
pillars.tawanoscope.text: Exploratory spaces for attention, capture, and transformation — developing new ways of seeing and making.

pillars.filmClub.subtitle: Screening & Expansion
pillars.filmClub.text: Screenings and conversations that expand cinema beyond the screen, building community around the moving image.

projects.intro: Current initiatives shaping Brussels' experimental audiovisual landscape.

projects.urban.text: An audiovisual creation lab exploring time as lived experience in Brussels — from workshop to collective film.
projects.beff.title: Brussels Experimental Film Festival
projects.beff.text: Four days of experimental cinema, video art, performances, and dialogue — seeking partners to co-develop.
gallery.title: In Motion
gallery.intro: Images from our workshops, screenings, and productions.
video.title: Watch
video.intro: Films and videos from our YouTube channel.
about.intro: A cinema and audiovisual practice rooted in craft, attention, and collective presence.
about.manifesto: Working across production, post-production, labs, and screenings, Tawanen explores how body, movement, and material distill into image, and how a slow gaze can cut through noise.
about.asbl: Tawanen ASBL is a Brussels-based cultural organization operating at the intersection of cinema, sound, and visual arts. We serve as a platform and network for filmmakers and audiovisual practitioners, with a focus on the relationship between image and sound, urban environments, and cinema as a tool for perception and reflection.
about.quote: Cinema as a soft, steady defense against noise, speed, and forgetting.
tawānigraph.subtitle: Production & Post-Production
tawānigraph.intro: Tawānigraph is where raw material becomes image — through production and post-production rooted in craft and attention.
tawānigraph.body1: We explore how body, movement, and material distill into image. Our approach prioritizes temporal composition — duration, layering, and resonance over conventional narrative.
tawānigraph.body2: From field recording to final cut, Tawānigraph handles the full arc of audiovisual creation with honesty and a slow rhythm.
tawānigraph.offerings.title: What We Offer
tawanoscope.subtitle: Labs & Workshops
tawanoscope.intro: Tawanoscope opens spaces for exploration — where participants develop new ways of seeing, listening, and making.
tawanoscope.body1: Our labs bring together filmmakers, artists, and curious minds to investigate identity, culture, and the urban environment through audiovisual practice.
tawanoscope.body2: Workshops move through phases of attention, capture, transformation, composition, and resolution — building skills while questioning how we perceive time and place.
tawanoscope.offerings.title: What We Offer
filmClub.subtitle: Screening & Expansion
filmClub.intro: The Film Club extends cinema beyond the screen — through screenings, conversations, and collective viewing experiences.
filmClub.body1: We curate programmes that challenge one-sided narratives and reveal hidden layers, bringing experimental and independent cinema to Brussels audiences.
filmClub.body2: From intimate screenings to festival-scale events, the Film Club creates space for dialogue between filmmakers, artists, and audiences.
filmClub.offerings.title: What We Offer
urban.subtitle: Audiovisual Creation Lab & Film Production
urban.intro: Urban Temporalities explores time as lived experience — shaped by rhythm, perception, and presence in Brussels.
urban.concept.title: Concept
urban.concept.text: Time is not merely measured but experienced — shaped by rhythm, perception, and presence. Brussels becomes a temporal landscape of acceleration, waiting, repetition, and interruption. Our artistic approach prioritizes temporal composition: duration, layering, and resonance over narrative.
urban.research.title: Research Dimensions
urban.phases.title: Workshop Phases

urban.phases.2.title: Capture
urban.phases.2.text: Recording image and sound in the urban field
urban.phases.3.title: Transformation
urban.phases.4.title: Composition
urban.phases.5.title: Resolution
urban.timeline.title: Timeline
urban.output.title: Output
urban.output.text: A collective 20–40 minute audiovisual film, premiered publicly and distributed to festivals. Opening programme of BEFF 2027.

beff.subtitle: BEFF 2027
beff.intro: Four days of experimental cinema, video art, performances, and dialogue in Brussels.
beff.about.title: About the Festival
beff.about.text: BEFF is a new festival dedicated to experimental cinema and video art, organized by Tawanen ASBL. We seek partners to host and co-develop this inaugural edition.
beff.programme.title: Programme
beff.programme.2: Curated experimental and video art screenings
beff.programme.5: Daily music programme — bands, composers, DJs
beff.opening.title: Opening Programme
beff.opening.text: Premiere of the collective film from the Urban Temporalities lab (May–Sept 2026), in collaboration with Pianofabriek city lab.
beff.inclusive.title: Inclusive Film Lab
beff.inclusive.text: Workshops for deaf and hard-of-hearing participants, culminating in the premiere of a 60-minute experimental film at the festival.

beff.homages.intro: Honouring pioneering voices in experimental cinema:
beff.objectives.title: Objectives
beff.objectives.text: Support emerging filmmakers, promote experimental cinema, create dialogue between artists and audiences, and strengthen Brussels' cultural landscape.
beff.audience.title: Target Audience
beff.audience.text: Artists, filmmakers, students, cultural professionals, and curious audiences.
beff.partner.title: Become a Partner
beff.partner.text: We are seeking partners to host and co-develop BEFF 2027. Join us in building Brussels' experimental film festival.
